JUDGE ROBERT A. BARCLAY, RPTR. MARYANN BURNS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. STEVEN LITTMAN DEFTS. IN PRO PER 2:00 PM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. STIP. SETTLMNT. FOR JUDGMNT REACHED: JUDGMNT. FOR PLTF. IMMEDIATE RESTITUTION OF PREMISES. LEASE IS FORFEITED. RENT AND DAMAGES OF $1,320.00. STAY OF EXECUTION TIL JUNE 5, 1994. PLTF. WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMNT IF DEFT. VACATES 6/5/94. DEFTS. WILL NOT SEEK ANY FURTHER STAY OF EVICTION. EACH SIDE WAIVES ATTY. FEES AND COSTS. SECURITY DEPOSIT IS FORFEITED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, ROBERTO MUNOZ, ROXANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 NATOMA #3, SFCA $1,320.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-05-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, STIP. IN OPEN COURT: PLTF.WILL FILE ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF OF SATISFACTION IF DEFT. VACATES BY 6/5/94 AT 8AM. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. DEFTS. WILL NOT SEEK FURTHER STAY OF EVICTION. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN ATTY. FEES AND COSTS. SEC. DEPOSIT IS FORFEITED.
